amazon.name: Amazon Pay ICICI Card
amazon.tagline: Unlimited, direct cashback into your Amazon wallet.
amazon.bestUse: All Amazon spends (5% Prime / 3% Non-Prime), flight bookings on Amazon, Utility Bills (2%).
amazon.worstUse: Local offline retail, offline groceries, rent payments, fuel, gold purchases.

sbi.name: SBI SimplySAVE Card
sbi.tagline: Engineered for traditional brick-and-mortar neighborhood shoppers.
sbi.bestUse: Offline Departmental Stores, offline Supermarkets, Casual dining & offline movies (10X Points).
sbi.worstUse: E-commerce shopping, international travel bookings, digital utility payments.

mmt.name: MMT ICICI Signature Card
mmt.tagline: High reward multipliers for avid holiday and flight bookers.
mmt.lounge: 8 Domestic + 1 International lounge access / Year (linked to spends)
mmt.bestUse: MakeMyTrip flight bookings (3% rewards), holiday packages & hotels (6% rewards), low forex spends.
mmt.worstUse: Daily utility bills, fuel, insurance reloads, general physical retail.

hdfc.name: HDFC MoneyBack Plus Card
hdfc.tagline: A well-rounded classic starter card for daily online spending.
hdfc.bestUse: Online shopping with partners (Amazon, Swiggy, Flipkart, BigBasket, Reliance Smart) (10X CashPoints).
hdfc.worstUse: Direct booking of flights/hotels via direct portals, rent, offline payments, wallet loading.

infinia.name: HDFC Infinia Metal Card
infinia.tagline: Unbeatable ultra-premium card offering high rewards on flight/hotel redemptions.
infinia.lounge: Unlimited domestic and international airport lounge access (unconditional)
infinia.bestUse: SmartBuy flight/hotel bookings (up to 33% back), voucher purchases (up to 16.5% back), offline luxury spends (3.3%).
infinia.worstUse: Standard offline payments that earn base 3.3%, fuel stations, wallet transfers.

regalia.name: HDFC Regalia Gold Card
regalia.tagline: Elegant gold-tiered credit card with strong travel perks.
regalia.lounge: 12 Domestic and 6 International complimentary airport lounges / Year
regalia.bestUse: SmartBuy hotel/flight bookings (6.6%), lifestyle products, Myntra & Nykaa brand spends (5X points).
regalia.worstUse: Utilities (reverts to base 1.3%), fuel transactions, tax payments.

millennia.name: HDFC Millennia Card
millennia.tagline: Direct 5% cashback on multiple popular internet commerce brands.
millennia.lounge: 8 Domestic Lounge visits / Year (linked to spends)
millennia.bestUse: Online partners like Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy, Zomato, Myntra, BookMyShow (5% cashback).
millennia.worstUse: Offline stores (1%), insurance premiums, wallet loads (0%).

tataneu.name: HDFC Tata Neu Infinity Card
tataneu.tagline: High returns in the Tata ecosystem and on daily UPI spend.
tataneu.lounge: 8 Domestic and 4 International Lounge visits / Year
tataneu.bestUse: Tata Neu ecosystem (BigBasket, 1mg, Tata Cliq, IHCL Hotels) (5% back), UPI payments (1.5%).

sbicashback.name: SBI Cashback Credit Card
sbicashback.tagline: Flat 5% online cashback with zero partner exceptions or limits.
sbicashback.bestUse: All online transactions anywhere on the internet (Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy, flights) (5% cash).
sbicashback.worstUse: Offline utility payments, offline supermarkets, school fees (1%).

sbiaurum.name: SBI Aurum Card
sbiaurum.tagline: Premium black metal credit card with highly rewarding offline accelerators.
sbiaurum.lounge: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access for cardholder and guests
sbiaurum.bestUse: High-volume international expenses (3.3%), dining venues (3.3%), movie tickets (Buy 1 Get 1 up to ₹1000).
sbiaurum.worstUse: Fuel stations, rental expenses, basic utilities.

axisace.name: Axis Bank Ace Card
axisace.tagline: Outstanding utility and physical merchant cashback tool.
axisace.bestUse: Utility bills and recharges via Google Pay (5%), Swiggy & Zomato orders (4%), all general offline retail (1.5%).

axisatlas.name: Axis Bank Atlas Card
axisatlas.tagline: Miles-focused travel card with industry-leading rewards on direct airlines.
axisatlas.lounge: Up to 12 Domestic and 4 International lounge visits / Year (tiered by membership)
axisatlas.waiver: N/A (Rewarded with 10,000 bonus edge miles on joining/milestones)
axisatlas.bestUse: Direct Airline hotel portals & brand travel sites (10% miles), international offline POS spends (4%).
axisatlas.worstUse: Basic utility recharges, government services, insurance payments (0%).

axisflipkart.name: Axis Bank Flipkart Card
axisflipkart.tagline: Dedicated co-branded card offering direct Flipkart and partner rebates.
axisflipkart.bestUse: Shopping on Flipkart & Myntra (5% flat), Swiggy, Uber, PVR orders (4%).
axisflipkart.worstUse: Amazon shopping (1.5%), utilities (1.5%), fuel surcharge areas.

axisneo.name: Axis Bank Neo Card
axisneo.tagline: Highly discounted entry-level card for online food ordering and recharges.
axisneo.bestUse: Ordering via Swiggy (40% discount up to ₹120 per order), Paytm utility recharges (10%).
axisneo.worstUse: Large offline shopping, flights, international billing.

icicicoral.name: ICICI Coral Credit Card
icicicoral.tagline: Entry-level card with dependable movie and restaurant benefits.
icicicoral.lounge: 4 Domestic Lounge visits / Year (linked to spends)
icicicoral.bestUse: Booking movie tickets on BookMyShow (25% discount), dining at partner restaurants.
icicicoral.worstUse: International luxury spends, high value e-commerce.

icicisapphiro.name: ICICI Sapphiro Card
icicisapphiro.tagline: Dual-branded (Visa/Amex) card offering premium dining and entertainment rewards.
icicisapphiro.lounge: 16 Domestic and 2 International lounge access / Year (spends linked)
icicisapphiro.bestUse: Weekend international offline expenses (1.5%), movie tickets (Buy 1 Get 1 on BMS).
icicisapphiro.worstUse: Everyday online checkout where co-branded cards deliver flat 5% value.

amexplat.name: Amex Platinum Travel Card
amexplat.tagline: Milestone card with massive rewards structure on annual expenditure goals.
amexplat.waiver: N/A (Rewarded with 48,000 bonus MR points + ₹10,000 Taj Vouchers on spends)
amexplat.bestUse: Accumulating exact milestone targets of ₹1.9 Lakh and ₹4 Lakh spends to trigger point jackpots (effective 8% yield).
amexplat.worstUse: Transactions above ₹4 Lakhs or split wallets that never reach milestone goals.

amexgold.name: Amex Gold Charge Card
amexgold.tagline: Flexible charge card with unique 5X rewards multiplier catalog.
amexgold.bestUse: Amex Reward Multiplier online gateway (10% reward value on voucher purchases), monthly 1,000 bonus points milestones.
amexgold.worstUse: Offline fuel, gold, utilities where rewards revert to 0.

hsbccash.name: HSBC Cashback Card
hsbccash.tagline: Top-tier 10% flat cashback for dining and grocery retail.
hsbccash.bestUse: All dining, food delivery platforms, and offline groceries (10% cashback up to ₹1,000 / Month).
hsbccash.worstUse: High value online electronics shopping, utility payments.

idfcwealth.name: IDFC First Wealth Card
idfcwealth.tagline: Incredible lifetime free premium card with progressive spend accelerators.
idfcwealth.lounge: 4 Domestic & 4 International Lounge visits / Quarter (linked to spends)
idfcwealth.bestUse: Online spending on milestones (1.5%), spends on your Birthday (2.5%), free lounge/movie tickets.
idfcwealth.worstUse: Daily micro offline payments that only earn 0.75%.
